name: @stackra/vite
purpose: Neutral Vite-config orchestrator — typed defineConfig helper and { enabled, factory, options } plugin-map envelope. Consumers bring their own plugin factories.
capabilities: Zero opinionated plugins — consumers register their own
when_to_use: Composing an app's vite.config.ts from a workspace-consistent plugin-map envelope.
when_not_to_use: For per-plugin config use each plugin's own factory; for build-time discovery use the owning package's /vite subpath.
